title: corallocarpus boehmii
intro: Corallocarpus boehmii, also known as the African potato or potato bush, is a type of succulent plant native to Africa. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Corallocarpus boehmii include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve boiling or infusing the roots and leaves in water to create a medicinal tea or decoction.
